citations.narrative:
In the dairy barn, insulation had previously been removed from overhead of all of the cow pens, however, there was a
residual amount that remained. This was located directly over the middle aisle of the barn, and some insulation material
was observed on the ground in this area. The silage for the cow consumption is placed in this location, and this situation
could lead to insulation being ingested by the animals. Ingestion of insulation material could be harmful and affect the
health of the cows. Animal housing facilities must be kept in good repair to protect the animals from injury. This must be
corrected.
**********Correct by April 1, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.125(a) 
   
Facilities, general. 
In the dairy barn, insulation had previously been removed from overhead of all of the cow pens, however, there was a 
residual amount that remained. This was located directly over the middle aisle of the barn, and some insulation material 
was observed on the ground in this area. The silage for the cow consumption is placed in this location, and this situation 
could lead to insulation being ingested by the animals. Ingestion of insulation material could be harmful and affect the 
health of the cows. Animal housing facilities must be kept in good repair to protect the animals from injury. This must be 
corrected.  
**********Correct by April 1, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
